# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the current live deployment at [deep-focus.vercel.app](https://deep-focus.vercel.app) is supported.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you find a security issue, please **do not open a public GitHub issue**.

Email: **[skdf2012@gmail.com]**

Include:

- A description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce it
- Potential impact

I'll acknowledge your report within **7 days** and aim to resolve confirmed issues within **30 days**.

## Scope

**In scope:**

- This repository's source code
- The live Vercel deployment

**Out of scope:**

- Vercel infrastructure (report to [Vercel](https://vercel.com/security))
- Third-party services used by the site
- Denial of service attacks

## Disclosure

Once a fix is shipped, I'm happy to credit you in the commit or release notes if you'd like.
